symbols.name: RepositoryExtensions
symbols.summary: Provides extension methods for the BridgingIT.DevKit.Domain.Repositories.IGenericReadOnlyRepository%601 interface.

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(IGenericRepository, Expression>, Action>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates all entities matching the provided expression in a single set-based operation.

syntax.content: public static Task UpdateSetAsync(this IGenericRepository source, Expression> expression, Action> set, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TEntity : class, IEntity

parameters.description: The repository used to execute the bulk update.
The expression used to build the filtering specification.
The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.
Optional query options used to shape the update operation.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.

parameters.description: The repository used to execute the bulk update.
The expression used to build the filtering specification.
The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.
Optional query options used to shape the update operation.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(IGenericRepository, FilterModel, Action>, IEnumerable>, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates all entities matched by the filter model and additional specifications in a single set-based operation.

syntax.content: public static Task UpdateSetAsync(this IGenericRepository source, FilterModel filterModel, Action> set, IEnumerable> specifications = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TEntity : class, IEntity

parameters.description: The repository used to execute the bulk update.
The filter model that is translated into specifications and query options.
The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.
Optional additional specifications that are combined with the specifications built from the filter model.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(IGenericReadOnlyRepository, Expression>, Expression>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Asynchronously projects all entities of type TEntity to a specified projection type based on the given specification, projection expression, options, and cancellation token.

syntax.content: public static Task> ProjectAllAsync(this IGenericReadOnlyRepository source, Expression> expression, Expression> projection, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TEntity : class, IEntity

parameters.description: The expression used to filter entities.
The expression defining the projection of entities.
Optional criteria for filtering and sorting results.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable collection of projected entities of type TProjection.

parameters.description: The expression used to filter entities.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an enumerable collection of projected entities of type TProjection.
